[PDF_PAGE 125 | score=9] ,Sword. Genieblight all othe r genies, even other genies of the same elemental type, with the weapon's standard attack and damage bonus. Genieblight XP Value: 600 GP Value: 3,000 Land ofFatc These swords may be of any type. They grant a + I combat bonus to attack and damage rolls, and grant a +2 against any of the geniekind, including common genies, tasked genies, noble genies, jann, and even gens. Geniescourge XPValue: 800 GPVa lue: 4,000 Land of Fate These weapons grant a +2 bonus in combat, but provide a +) to attack and damage rolls against specific geniekind (dao, marid, efreeti or djinni). [PDF_PAGE 158 | score=8] Stalker Xt'Vallle: 2,000 GPVa llle: 10,000 Howl From the North Sialker is an enigmatic and powerful weapon that reveals its full powers on ly in the hands of a ranger. To anyone else, it is merely a long sword + /. It has a slcnder, long blue steel blade, but its hilt, pommel, and qui lions are made of a stark black meta l that is as hard as adamantite. If Stalker is stared at for any length of time, it seems to have wisps of shadowstuff moving silently across its surface, although this is just illusory ... or is it? Slulker is a +3 neutral good weapon when used by a ranger. The ranger gains a + I bonus to Wis­ dom and Intelligence while in possession of this blade. The ranger also gains a +
[PDF_PAGE 266 | score=7] "\ ofFlame* XP Value: +200 GP Value: +1,000 Oriental Advcntun:s Upon uttering the command word, the weapon bursts into magical flame. This flame causes 2d4 points of additional damage on a successful hit. It ignites combustible item s 40% of the time. It casts light out to a 15-foot radius. The weapon remains flaming unlilth e c hara cler utters the command word again. The flame does no damage to the weapon, regardless of the weapon's mater­ ial. of Flaming* XP Value: +200 GP Value: +1,000 IJut.lGEOWS & DRI<OONs Rules Cyclopedia The point or edge of a weapon that has this talent will blaze with flames upon command. The flute's melody can be heard by all within 120 feet, regardless of obstruc­ tions, nnd may attract monsters . of Playing XP Value: 1,000 G P Value: 5,000 DRAGON Magazi ne 7] An ebo ny flute. [PDF_PAGE 82 | score=6] 7 Doss XP Value: 2,200 GP Value: 11 ,000 DuNGEON M ASTER Guide This instrument is 60".4. likely to deliver 4d4 points of damage to any nonbard or bard under 8th level who picks it up and attempts to play it. An 8th­ level or higher bard who plays the lute has a 20-.4. bener ehance of channing and can sing the follow­ ing magical songs once per day. If the bard's charming ab ility exceeds 100% with the inst ru­ ment bonus, the creature saving against the magic does so at - I for every 5% above 100%, rounding the charm bonus to the nearest multiplier of 5. Hold animal once a day. Neutralize poison once a day. Protection/rom fire /0' radius once a day. Any character able to play this instrument

[PDF_PAGE 26 | score=5] charges. In either case, the range of the created swarm is 60 feet + 10 feet per level ofth7 caste r. Aric 's Staff of Power XPValue: 12,000 G P Value: 75,000 1992 Fantasy Collector Card 22 Aric's version of this powerful staff is a variation of the staff of power. The following powers con­ sume one charge: continuallight ,fire burst, dark­ ness 5' radius, ray of enfeeblement, cone of cold , and ride the wind. Expending two charges will grant the following: shield 5' radius, globe of invulnerability, and lower resistance. In addition, the staff gives Aric a +2 bonus to his Armor Class and saving throws , and a +4 bonus to saving throws vs. alteration spe lls. Expending charges does not cause
